archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) mixed with Retro-Futurism for developers

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-heading font-bold
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-heading font-semibold

rules: Never use pure black or gray; zinc/slate tinted scales are required.
Primary brand color (Blue) should only be used for active states and primary CTAs.
Ensure text over accents maintains a minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio.

spacing_and_layout.system: Generous Spacing Philosophy combined with Control Room density.

dashboard_grid.name: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID
dashboard_grid.base_classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
rules: Every pixel must be utilized. No jagged bottoms.
Add 'h-full' to card wrappers to ensure they stretch to match their neighbors.
Use 'align-items: start' on grid wrapper if overriding default stretch, but 'align-self: stretch' on specific items.

dashboard_cards.hover_classes: transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-md hover:border-zinc-300 dark:hover:border-zinc-700

rules: Must be sticky at the top.

components_strategy.general: Always use pure HTML + Tailwind for structural bento layouts. Use heavily customized Shadcn UI for interactive elements.
components_strategy.buttons: Flat design, crisp edges (rounded-md). Explicit hover states (e.g., hover:bg-blue-600 hover:text-white).
components_strategy.charts: Shadcn charts (Recharts) for Readiness Score (Donut/Radial) and Weekly Graph (Area/Bar). Remove grid lines to maintain clean technical look.
components_strategy.icons: react-icons (specifically react-icons/si for SiGithub, SiLeetcode, SiCodeforces) and lucide-react for general UI.
components_strategy.forms: Never use native <input>. Use Shadcn Input, Form, Checkbox with explicit focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500).

motion_and_interactions.general: Micro-interactions only. No large distracting animations.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must shift visually on hover.

auth_background_dark.description: Abstract technical geometric data background for Dark Mode auth page
auth_background_dark.usage: Background image for the split-screen auth layout (email/password & Google OAuth) in dark mode.

auth_background_light.description: Abstract technical geometric data background for Light Mode auth page
auth_background_light.usage: Background image for the split-screen auth layout (email/password & Google OAuth) in light mode.

user_avatar.usage: Placeholder for user profile avatar in dashboard header.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_ids: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='theme-toggle-button').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards. Use pure white text on deep blue buttons.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: You MUST add 'next-themes' to implement the Dark/Light mode toggle properly. Make sure Shadcn theme setup uses next-themes.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: For fonts, import them in index.css. Setup Tailwind config extending font families: `heading: ['Outfit', 'sans-serif']`, `body: ['IBM Plex Sans', 'sans-serif']`, `mono: ['JetBrains Mono', 'monospace']`.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Install 'react-icons' for platform logos: SiGithub, SiLeetcode, SiCodeforces.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: The Readiness Score must be a combination chart (like a Donut/Radial chart) showing the breakdown (DSA 45%, Projects 30%, Consistency 25%).
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Do NOT use rounded-full for cards; use rounded-lg (8px) for that sharp technical dashboard look.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Create a split-screen layout for the Auth page. Left side: The provided auth background image (dynamically swap based on theme). Right side: The login/signup form.
